SYSTEM_PROMPT: A cinematic portrait world inspired by velvet-drenched nocturnal elegance, aristocratic interiors, and decadent gothic couture aesthetics. The visual language blends baroque opulence with restrained fine-art portrait photography, where soft chiaroscuro lighting sculpts the figure against luxurious theatrical environments. Subjects inhabit dimly lit interiors such as abandoned opera houses, aristocratic salons, vintage theaters, or velvet-lined boudoirs filled with heavy drapery, antique mirrors, and ornate furniture. Lighting remains controlled and painterly, often built around a single key light with deep shadows and delicate rim highlights that emphasize fabric texture and facial structure. The atmosphere evokes timeless melancholy and quiet decadence, as if capturing a forgotten aristocratic moment suspended in time. Wardrobe emphasizes elegant couture pieces: velvet gowns, lace bodices, flowing chiffon dresses, or minimalist evening silhouettes with subtle gothic influences. Compositions focus on graceful posture and sculptural posing rather than movement, highlighting elegance, silhouette, and emotional stillness. Color palettes lean toward deep reds, black velvet tones, muted greens, and shadow-heavy environments that feel intimate and cinematic. The result resembles fine art editorial photography inspired by classical portrait painting, vintage couture photography, and theatrical staging, creating a mood of aristocratic solitude, quiet sensuality, and timeless nocturnal beauty.
OUTFITS: corseted evening dress with soft structure
silk slip dress with vintage cut
tailored gothic evening suit for women
long satin gown with subtle slit
dark lace bodice with flowing skirt
LIGHTING: single key light with deep shadows
soft top light sculpting facial features
POSES: lying sideways on a velvet chaise longue
relaxed seated pose on velvet sofa
crossed legs seated on velvet couch
elongated reclining pose with arched back
upright seated pose with hands resting softly
standing with weight shifted on one leg
slow walking pose with flowing fabric
CAMERA_ANGLES: full body portrait with negative space

SENSUALITY_LEVEL.1: suggested femininity through posture and fabric
SENSUALITY_LEVEL.3: decadent elegance with subtle erotic tension, never explicit

HORROR_INTENSITY.2: atmosphere-driven darkness, no explicit horror elements
